---
title: "John Murray Drummond"
---

## John Murray Drummond

**Dates:** (1803-1889)

### Description

of Megginch Castle, brother-in-law of Elizabeth Jane Oswald

### Biography

He married Frances Jemima Oswald (1818-1891), half-sister of Elizabeth Jane Oswald.

### Letters

- Letter from June 26th [?1882[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
